title: Prologis Reports Third Quarter 2025 Earnings
content: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD) today reported results for the third quarter of 2025. Net earnings per diluted share were $0.79, and Core FFO per diluted share was $1.42. The company signed 47 million square feet of new leases during the quarter, with average rent change on rollover of 32.1%. Occupancy ended the quarter at 95.8%.

title: Prologis Acquires 3.2M Sq Ft Logistics Portfolio in Dallas-Fort Worth
content: Prologis announced the acquisition of a 3.2 million square foot Class-A logistics portfolio in the Dallas-Fort Worth metro area for approximately $620 million. The portfolio consists of 8 buildings, 96% leased to investment-grade tenants, and expands Prologis' DFW footprint by approximately 12%.

title: Prologis Expands Chicago Operations with New Build-to-Suit Development
content: Prologis broke ground on a 1.1 million square foot build-to-suit logistics facility in Joliet, Illinois, serving a Fortune 100 retailer. The project represents a $145 million investment and is expected to be delivered in Q3 2026, further strengthening Prologis' presence in the Chicago metro area.

title: Prologis Reports Second Quarter 2025 Earnings
content: Prologis reported Q2 2025 net earnings per diluted share of $0.74 and Core FFO per diluted share of $1.38. Same-store NOI growth was 6.2% on a cash basis. The company raised its full-year 2025 Core FFO guidance to a range of $5.55 to $5.65 per share.

title: Prologis Launches $500M Solar Energy Initiative Across US Portfolio
content: Prologis announced a $500 million investment to deploy rooftop solar across 200 buildings in its US logistics portfolio over the next three years. The initiative is expected to generate over 400 megawatts of clean energy capacity, supporting tenant ESG commitments and Prologis' net-zero targets.

title: Prologis Acquires Premier Industrial Asset in Los Angeles Submarket
content: Prologis closed on the acquisition of a 450,000 square foot Class-A industrial property in the South Bay submarket of Los Angeles for $185 million. The asset is fully leased to a leading e-commerce tenant and complements Prologis' existing Southern California portfolio.

title: Prologis Reports First Quarter 2025 Earnings
content: Prologis reported Q1 2025 Core FFO per diluted share of $1.34, exceeding consensus estimates. The company commenced $810 million of new development starts during the quarter and ended Q1 with $6.5 billion in available liquidity.

title: Prologis Opens New Logistics Hub in Miami-Dade County
content: Prologis officially opened its newest logistics hub, a 410,000 square foot Class-A facility in Medley, Florida. The property is strategically located near Miami International Airport and PortMiami, serving the growing Latin American trade corridor.

title: Prologis Acquires 1.8M Sq Ft Portfolio in Phoenix Metro
content: Prologis announced the acquisition of a 1.8 million square foot industrial portfolio in the Phoenix metropolitan area for $310 million. The portfolio consists of 6 modern logistics buildings, 100% leased, and expands Prologis' Phoenix presence to over 18 million square feet.

title: Prologis Reports Full Year 2024 Results
content: Prologis reported full-year 2024 net earnings per diluted share of $3.05 and Core FFO per diluted share of $5.46. The company completed $4.2 billion in acquisitions and started $3.1 billion in new developments during the year. Average occupancy for 2024 was 96.4%.
